title: hebe armstrongii
intro: Hebe armstrongii, also known as the Armstrong's Hebe, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hebe armstrongii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Hebe armstrongii is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a treatment for various health conditions.
